languages.text: [Перехватить оружие поудобнее] "Посмотрим, чего ты стоишь в честном бою, изворотливая ты тварь".
[Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."
languages.original_text: [Перехватить оружие поудобнее] "Посмотрим, чего ты стоишь в честном бою, изворотливая ты тварь".

traits.locale_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

[Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

languages.text: [Empuñas tu arma con firmeza] «A ver qué tal te desenvuelves en una pelea justa, maldito bellaco».
languages.original_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

traits.locale_text: [Empuñas tu arma con firmeza] «A ver qué tal te desenvuelves en una pelea justa, maldito bellaco».

languages.text: 【调整武器握姿】“来啊，卑鄙的家伙，让我看看你在公平对决中还剩下几分本事。”
languages.original_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

traits.locale_text: 【调整武器握姿】“来啊，卑鄙的家伙，让我看看你在公平对决中还剩下几分本事。”

languages.text: [Resserrer votre poing sur votre arme] « Voyons ce que vous valez en combat loyal, espèce de fourbe. »
languages.original_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

traits.locale_text: [Resserrer votre poing sur votre arme] « Voyons ce que vous valez en combat loyal, espèce de fourbe. »

languages.text: [Silahının kabzasını sık] "Adil bir dövüşte neler yapabileceğini görelim sefil yaratık."
languages.original_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

traits.locale_text: [Silahının kabzasını sık] "Adil bir dövüşte neler yapabileceğini görelim sefil yaratık."

languages.text: [Waffe fester umfassen] "Mal sehen, was Ihr in einem fairen Kampf wert seid, Teufel."
languages.original_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

traits.locale_text: [Waffe fester umfassen] "Mal sehen, was Ihr in einem fairen Kampf wert seid, Teufel."

languages.text: [武器の構えを調整]「正々堂々で勝負してみよう。ずる賢い野郎め。」
languages.original_text: [Adjust your grip on your weapon] "Let's see what you're worth in a fair fight, you devious wretch."

traits.locale_text: [武器の構えを調整]「正々堂々で勝負してみよう。ずる賢い野郎め。」
